title: How fluid PSG exposed Slot's back-five tweak
summary: Arne Slot changed Liverpool's defensive formation for their Champions League quarter-final against PSG, but European champions Paris St-Germain exploited the tactical adjustment to dominate the encounter. The analysis examines how PSG's fluid play exposed weaknesses in Liverpool's back-five setup.
content: Arne Slot changed Liverpool's shape for their Champions League quarter-final first leg - but their tactics were still bested by European champions Paris St-Germain. Umir Irfan explains how.

zh.title: PSG的流畅打法如何戳穿Slot的后五卫防线调整
zh.summary: 阿尔内·斯洛特为与巴黎圣日耳曼的欧冠四分之一决赛改变了利物浦的防线阵容,但欧洲冠军巴黎圣日耳曼利用这一战术调整控制了比赛。分析探讨了巴黎圣日耳曼的流畅进攻如何揭露了利物浦后五卫防线的弱点。

title: Howe's future & likely sales - why Newcastle face key summer
summary: Newcastle's inconsistent season has created uncertainty about manager Eddie Howe's future and sparked questions over potential summer departures of key players. BBC Sport assesses the defining challenges facing the club as they navigate a critical transfer window.
content: Newcastle's inconsistent season leaves them facing a defining summer - with questions over Eddie Howe's future and sales of key players a possibility. BBC Sport assesses the situation.

zh.title: 豪的前景与可能的转会——纽卡斯尔为何面临关键夏季
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔不稳定的赛季引发了对主教练埃迪·豪前景的不确定性,也引发了对关键球员可能在夏窗离队的疑问。BBC体育评估了这家俱乐部在应对关键转会期时面临的决定性挑战。

title: Wilson delighted with Fulham's 'amazing' progress
summary: Fulham forward Harry Wilson reflects on his strong individual performances and the positive working relationship with manager Marco Silva as the club continues its impressive development. Wilson expresses satisfaction with the club's overall trajectory and progress.
content: Fulham forward Harry Wilson talks about his impressive individual performances, his relationship with manager Marco Silva, and Fulham's progress.

zh.title: 威尔逊对富勒姆'惊人'的进步感到欣喜
zh.summary: 富勒姆前锋哈里·威尔逊回顾了自己出色的个人表现和与主教练马可·席尔瓦的良好工作关系,俱乐部继续实现令人印象深刻的发展。威尔逊对俱乐部的整体发展轨迹和进步表示满意。

title: Stick or sack? Slot's Liverpool future dominates UCL talking points
summary: Following Liverpool's 2-0 Champions League quarter-final defeat to PSG, ESPN's expert panel debates whether Wednesday's performance was Arne Slot's worst yet and discusses implications for his future at the club. The loss has intensified scrutiny on the manager's tactical direction.
content: Was Wednesday's 2-0 loss Liverpool's worst performance under Arne Slot? ESPN's Mark Ogden, Julien Laurens, Gab Marcotti and Sam Tighe weigh in on that and all the other moments that mattered from the UCL quarterfinal first legs.

zh.title: 续任还是下课？斯洛特的利物浦前景主导欧冠讨论
zh.summary: 在利物浦以0:2负于巴黎圣日耳曼的欧冠四分之一决赛首回合后，ESPN专家组讨论周三的表现是否是阿尔内·斯洛特最差的一次，并讨论了这对他在俱乐部未来的影响。这次失利加强了对主帅战术方向的审视。

title: PSG's wastefulness leaves door open, but this isn't Klopp's Liverpool any more
summary: Liverpool lost 2-0 to PSG in the Champions League first leg, with manager Arne Slot acknowledging his team were "ripped apart." The absence of Jurgen Klopp's trademark attacking style makes a second-leg comeback improbable despite Liverpool mathematically remaining alive.
content: Liverpool escaped with a 2-0 loss vs. PSG in the Champions League. But with Jurgen Klopp's "heavy metal" style nowhere to be seen, a second-leg comeback looks improbable.

zh.title: 巴黎圣日耳曼的浪费留下生机，但这不再是克洛普时代的利物浦
zh.summary: 利物浦在欧冠首轮0-2负于巴黎圣日耳曼，主教练阿尔内·斯洛特承认球队被"撕裂"。缺少尤尔根·克洛普标志性的进攻风格使次回合逆转变得困难，尽管利物浦在数学上仍有生存机会。

title: Champions League specialist Álvarez shows Barça what they're missing
summary: Julián Álvarez delivered an energetic, world-class performance for Atlético Madrid against Barcelona in the Champions League, showcasing exactly why the club rates him so highly and won't part with him cheaply.
content: An energetic display capped off by a piece of world-class magic; Wednesday's performance is exactly why Barça rate Julián Álvarez so highly, and the reason Atleti won't give up their talisman cheaply.

zh.title: 欧冠专家阿尔瓦雷斯向巴萨展示他们缺少什么
zh.summary: 胡利安·阿尔瓦雷斯为马德里竞技在欧冠对阵巴萨的比赛中表现出充满活力的世界级表现，展示了为什么俱乐部如此看重他，不会廉价出售他。
